results.title: Credit Management SSCUIs with "1QM, BD6" scope reference - Required when only BD6 (Basic Credit Mana
results.description: Hi SAP Community, We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for a manufacturing company. Our scope includes **BD6 (Basic Credit Management)** but **NOT 1QM (Advanced Credit Management)**. However, several Credit Management SSCUIs in our BDCQ have **both "1QM, BD6"** listed in the Scope Re...

results.title: Haryana CM Promotes Fuel Conservation by Cycling to Sukna Lake
results.description: Chandigarh, May 19: In response to Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s appeal for fuel conservation amid the global energy crisis, Haryana Chief Minister Nayab Singh Saini took to cycling on Tuesday. He rode to the rainwater-filled Sukna Lake and then embarked on his morning walk. A government spokesperson informed that during his walk, CM Saini interacted ...
